title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Zoro, Usopp. Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey...~ that orange girl is cute!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Their ship is the cutie wagon.....~!!!

summary: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
